With reference to the information given above, choose the correct option(s).
Correct answer: N/A
Solution

(a, b, c, d)

Q7 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following options is incorrect in reference to matrix method of structure analysis?

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
• Flexibility stiffnes matrix is equal to its transpose (A′ = A symmetric matrix) as it is a square matrix and its elements are symmetrical about main diagonal.
• Elements of main diagonal (leading diagonal) of stiffness/flexibility matrix are always positive.

Q8 Not checked
Technical • CIVIL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0
Not attempted

A three-hinged parabolic arch of total span 20 m has its two end supports at 4 m and 2 m below the crown respectively. The arch is subjected to uniformly distributed load of intensity 15 kN/m. The horizontal thrust is _____ kN. (Correct upto two decimal places

NAT
Correct answer: 257.36
Solution

257.36 (257 - 258)

(Correct upto two decimal places)

of thermal expansion of steel is 1.2 × 10–5 per °C per unit length.
NAT
Correct answer: 1.02
Solution

1.02 (0.95 - 1.10)
